expected_effect: Keep anti-arb gains while reducing unnecessary symmetric fee spend through a cleaner tri-channel assembly.
expected_failure_signature: If the final quote still behaves like one smoothed additive envelope, the branch is a disguised replay; if inventory centering fights toxicity, either broad overpricing or silent cheapening returns.
expected_win_condition: Deliver a structural pivot that preserves selective protection and lowers average fee relative to the dead split-side family.
hidden_coupling_removed: One broad surface should not absorb baseline defense, toxic charging, and inventory-centering pressure at the same time.
rationale: Assemble final quotes from a persistent floor, a toxic-side adverse-selection tax, and an inventory-centering channel that cannot fight the toxic signal.
title: Inventory-toxicity tri-channel router
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes quote assembly itself by introducing a third orthogonal channel instead of reweighting the dead two-channel split.
